scripts.qa:mobile:setup: APPIUM_HOME=.tmp/appium NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=.tmp/npm-cache appium driver install xcuitest
scripts.qa:mobile:doctor: APPIUM_HOME=.tmp/appium NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=.tmp/npm-cache appium driver list --installed && APPIUM_HOME=.tmp/appium NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=.tmp/npm-cache appium driver doctor xcuitest && xcrun simctl list runtimes && xcrun simctl list devices available
